title: CPH2417_14.0.0.714(EX01)
description:
New version: CPH2417_14.0.0.714(EX01)

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

System

• Integrates the December 2024 Android security patch to enhance system security.

• Fixes an issue with time accuracy when there's no internet connection.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
